what_broke: Two profiles for the same event 'Traversee du Massacre' under slugs traverse-du-massacre + traversee-du-massacre, inflating race counts
root_cause: AI-generated profiles created the same race twice with hallucinated slug variants
fix_applied: Removed the non-canonical traversee-du-massacre.json, kept traverse-du-massacre.json
regression_check: immune_check.py check_fuzzy_duplicates() — fuzzy name-similarity >= 0.88 flags near-duplicate slugs

what_broke: Questionnaire 'Build my plan' CTA (/questionnaire/?race=SLUG) 404'd on all 229 race pages — the conversion/money path was dead
root_cause: questionnaire/coaching dirs not synced to SiteGround or cache not purged after deploy (deploy-class, not per-page)
fix_applied: Re-deployed questionnaire + coaching surfaces and purged SiteGround cache
regression_check: immune_check.py --live run_live_link_check() flags any dead /questionnaire/ or /coaching/ link as a RED money-path-404; check_money_path_wiring() guards the generator offline
